name: static-html
title: Static HTML
tagline: Zero build. Plain HTML, CSS, and JS.
description: Hand-written HTML with relative links, so it works at any base path with no configuration. The simplest way to get something on GitHub Pages.

name: astro
title: Astro
description: A statically-rendered Astro site that ships zero JS by default and hydrates only interactive components. Great for content, blogs, docs, and marketing pages.

name: react-vite
title: React + Vite
description: A React single-page app built with Vite, with React Router, a base-path-aware basename, and a 404.html fallback so deep links survive a refresh. Good for interactive apps and dashboards.

name: eleventy
title: Eleventy (11ty)
description: Markdown content and structured data rendered to fast HTML by Eleventy. Collections, layouts, and a base-path-aware url filter. Good for blogs, docs, and data-backed pages.
basePathMechanism: pathPrefix via PATH_PREFIX env + url filter

name: jekyll
title: Jekyll
description: A Jekyll site built with the official actions/jekyll-build-pages action. Markdown posts, Liquid layouts, and a base-path-aware relative_url filter. The most GitHub-native option.
